reviews.comment:
Los chicos de la playa son muy amables,  muy buena atención!!!

(Translated by Google)
The beach guys are very friendly, very good service!!!

reviews.comment:
Muy buenas instalaciones y espacio al aire libre. Limpio y ordenado.
Al haber una sola cajera, hay demora en el Shop más si uno pide un menu

(Translated by Google)
Very good facilities and outdoor space. Clean and tidy. However, since there's only one cashier, there are delays in the shop, especially if you order a meal.
